title: podman system renumber fails if a volume exists
body:
### Issue Description

Describe your issue:
`podman system renumber` will fail with `updating volume config table with new configuration for volume test: no such column: ID` if a volume exists.

### Steps to reproduce the issue

Steps to reproduce the issue
1. podman volume create test
2. podman system renumber

### Describe the results you received

```
# podman system renumber
updating volume config table with new configuration for volume test: no such column: ID
```


### Describe the results you expected

Renumbering succeeds.
